{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Emissary Kahn Mala
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emissary Kahn Mala]] is an [[Archlady]] from [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
